title: Outcome Measurement, Baselines, Guardrails, and Evaluation Design · Claim Repair Board
summary: A preserved decision record for outcome measurement, baselines, guardrails, and evaluation design contains one plausible evidence, scope, design, implementation, evaluation, or ownership defect. Find the first unsupported claim before changing the product. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in outcome evaluation and measurement protocol and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, cau…
objectives: Model inputs, activities, outputs, short and long outcomes, assumptions, external factors, and possible negative pathways.
Translate each construct into observable measure, population, unit, collection method, timing, uncertainty, and interpretation limit.
Choose historical, within-subject, benchmark, cohort, staged, qualitative, or build-nothing comparison appropriate to the claim.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Order the regression proof · Debug Analysis Precommitment
steps.instruction:
Order the Analysis Precommitment evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Order the regression proof · Debug Analysis Precommitment.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Analysis Precommitment assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Order the regression proof · Debug Analysis Precommitment, keep Analysis Precommitment connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: Impact is inferred from vanity metrics after launch without a baseline, comparison, guardrail, subgroup view, or precommitted interpretation. The debug variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Precommit inclusion, exclusion, missing-data, success, stopping, and interpretation rules before seeing outcome data.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Analysis Precommitment has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: For Order the regression proof · Debug Analysis Precommitment, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Analysis Precommitment precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Order the regression proof · Debug Analysis Precommitment, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: Impact is inferred from vanity metrics after launch without a baseline, comparison, guardrail, subgroup view, or precommitted interpretation. The debug variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Precommit inclusion, exclusion, missing-data, success, stopping, and interpretation rules before seeing outcome data.

For Order the regression proof · Debug Analysis Precommitment, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Changing an analysis after seeing results is harmless exploration.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints for the debug Analysis Precommitment case
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure for the debug Analysis Precommitment case
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence for the debug Analysis Precommitment case
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise for the debug Analysis Precommitment case

stimulus.title: Theory Of Change case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Impact is inferred from vanity metrics after launch without a baseline, comparison, guardrail, subgroup view, or precommitted interpretation. The debug variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Model inputs, activities, outputs, short and long outcomes, assumptions, external factors, and possible negative pathways.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A feature roadmap is equivalent to a theory of change.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Model inputs, activities, outputs, short and long outcomes, assumptions, external factors, and possible negative pathways. Artifact under review: outcome evaluation and measurement protocol.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the inspect the failure record evidence boundary.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Theory Of Change, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Analysis Precommitment
steps.instruction:
Append a capstone-analysis-precommitment-lhs11f: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Analysis Precommitment.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Analysis Precommitment into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Analysis Precommitment, keep Analysis Precommitment connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.code:
capstone-analysis-precommitment-lhs11f:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

hints: For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Analysis Precommitment, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Analysis Precommitment precondition, or invariant that must hold.

steps.title: Publish the incident record · Debug Analysis Precommitment
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Analysis Precommitment: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Impact is inferred from vanity metrics after launch without a baseline, comparison, guardrail, subgroup view, or precommitted interpretation. The debug variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Precommit inclusion, exclusion, missing-data, success, stopping, and interpretation rules before seeing outcome data.

Evidence target: Publish the incident record · Debug Analysis Precommitment.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Publish the incident record · Debug Analysis Precommitment, keep Analysis Precommitment connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Precommit inclusion, exclusion, missing-data, success, stopping, and interpretation rules before seeing outcome data.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.

checks.description: The decision applies Theory Of Change to the changed stakeholder case.
checks.failureMessage: Recheck the conditions and reject the documented misconception about Theory Of Change.
